text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the academy's tryout races are being held. Whether or not a
student can perform well enough to get scouted can significantly
affect their future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking around, I spy heaps of other trainers milling about, from
newbies to veterans alike. Seems like everyone's got their eyes on
those two today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll try my best out there today!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: So that's Daiwa Scarlet... She's definitely got potential, I'll say that!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She kept a dominant lead after the third turn in yesterday's
scrimmage... meaning it's gonna be a tough fight to become her
trainer. And huh, there's her competition!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sup.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I see. Vodka's doing a better job of keeping her nerves in check.
Now, the question is—who will prevail?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. As if we're even on the same level.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yo, I heard that. Heh, just don't come crying to me later, all right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and just who do you think you're talking to? I'm the number one
racer, Daiwa Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks are already flying between these two promising rookies. Looks
like this'll be a race to remember!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And they're off! The racers are out of the gate!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And leading the pack—it's Daiwa Scarlet! She's taken an early lead
with her impressive speed!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
B-but is she going to be able to keep up that pace?! Even for her, this
might be a little...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Nah, if there's one thing you can count on, it's that Daiwa Scarlet's
got tons of fuel in the tank. Look again.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
The others are speeding up to try and match her, but they won't be
able to keep up that pace for long. All according to plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet has held the lead since the start of the race. But
coming into the final stretch, a challenger appears!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Damn... I'm not—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: —I'm not just gonna roll over and let you win!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, rounding the final turn! Vodka, giving chase! Daiwa Scarlet is
right in front of her!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tch?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Raaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Speed! Vodka is speed! An astounding comeback! Vodka and Daiwa
Scarlet are neck and neck!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Ughhh! No... I won't let her!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Because—that number one spot is mine!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet, Vodka! Daiwa Scarlet, Vodka! The finish line is right
there! Your winner is—

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
—Vodka! It came down to the wire, but Vodka takes first! In second,
Daiwa Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Woo... Heh-heh. Looks like I'm the winner today, Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...The hell? Thought she'd be a bit cooler than that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the tryouts end with Vodka as the victor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that evening...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... No, this isn't enough! More, I need more stamina!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Not like that, never again!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Wh-who's there?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, a trainer? I saw you at the tryouts earlier...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: My apologies. I'm currently training, so could I ask you to leave?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm... a little busy beating my good-for-nothing self into shape.
choice_data_list: Isn't finishing second pretty amazing already?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Second best won't cut it! I HAVE to be number one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah... S-sorry.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: At any rate, I'll be leaving now. Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet. To her, nothing's more important than being number
one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And for some reason, I can't get her out of my mind...
